contexto.sinopse:
In a world where the Han Empire never fell, martial arts is a power used to squeeze people dry. So when a new continent is discovered, both good and evil men alike flee to settle there and escape the tyranny of the Emperor, opening up the era of a Martial Wild West.

In the turbulent frontier, Zhang Qian is a man that reincarnated from our cushy, modern world, but his new world is nothing like the fantastical world he dreamed about from reading martial arts novels. While the martial arts in his new world are powerful, they are also too crude and lack elegance. And so Qian journeys along the continent for his dream of bringing true martial arts back to the new realm.

(Source: Naver, translated)

text_layers.original: HYAAH!!
text_layers.translated: HYAAH!!
text_layers.text: HYAAH!!

text_layers.original: WHY DO YOU KEEP WORKING ON MANHWAS EVEN THOUGH IT'S HARD??
text_layers.translated: POR QUE VOCÊ CONTINUA TRABALHANDO NO MANHWAS MESMO SENDO DIFÍCIL?
text_layers.text: WHY DO YOU KEEP WORKING ON MANHWAS EVEN THOUGH IT'S HARD??

text_layers.original: Martial Wild West
text_layers.translated: Oeste selvagem marcial
text_layers.text: Martial Wild West
text_layers.connected_reasoner_notes: Ajustei o lobo esquerdo para 'outer-upper' (32, 47) para melhor alinhamento humano e o direito para 'outer-lower' (290, 68) para seguir a leitura diagonal e o stagger vertical. Mantive o tamanho próximo ao original e garantindo que as caixas fiquem inteiramente dentro dos respectivos lobos vermelhos.

text_layers.original: -HELP US WITH DONATIONS
text_layers.translated: -NOS AJUDE COM DOAÇÕES
text_layers.text: -HELP US WITH DONATIONS

textos.original: HYAAH!!
textos.traduzido: HYAAH!!

textos.original: WHY DO YOU KEEP WORKING ON MANHWAS EVEN THOUGH IT'S HARD??
textos.traduzido: POR QUE VOCÊ CONTINUA TRABALHANDO NO MANHWAS MESMO SENDO DIFÍCIL?

textos.original: Martial Wild West
textos.traduzido: Oeste selvagem marcial

textos.original: -HELP US WITH DONATIONS
textos.traduzido: -NOS AJUDE COM DOAÇÕES

text_layers.original: AMAZING.
text_layers.translated: INCRÍVEL.
text_layers.text: AMAZING.

text_layers.original: A MARTIAL ART THAT DRAWS OUT THE POWER OF LIGHTNING.
text_layers.translated: UMA ARTE MARCIAL QUE EXTRAI O PODER DO RAIO.
text_layers.text: A MARTIAL ART THAT DRAWS OUT THE POWER OF LIGHTNING.

text_layers.original: HNH...
text_layers.translated: HMM...
text_layers.text: HNH...

text_layers.original: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
text_layers.translated: A rápida raposa marrom salta sobre o cachorro preguiçoso.
text_layers.text: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
text_layers.connected_reasoner_notes: Ajustei o lobo esquerdo para 'outer-upper' (108, 30) para seguir a leitura diagonal e o grupo verde superior. Ajustei o lobo direito para 'outer-lower' (594, 62) para seguir a leitura diagonal e o grupo verde inferior. Mantive o tamanho próximo ao original e garanti que as caixas fiquem inteiramente dentro dos respectivos lobos vermelhos, preservando o stagger vertical (topo/esquerda vs. baixo/direita).

textos.original: AMAZING.
textos.traduzido: INCRÍVEL.

textos.original: A MARTIAL ART THAT DRAWS OUT THE POWER OF LIGHTNING.
textos.traduzido: UMA ARTE MARCIAL QUE EXTRAI O PODER DO RAIO.

textos.original: HNH...
textos.traduzido: HMM...

textos.original: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
textos.traduzido: A rápida raposa marrom salta sobre o cachorro preguiçoso.

text_layers.original: ONCE THAT FORCE IS RELEASED,
text_layers.translated: UMA VEZ QUE ESSA FORÇA É LIBERADA,
text_layers.text: ONCE THAT FORCE IS RELEASED,
text_layers.connected_reasoner_notes: Ajustei as caixas para seguir o centro dos grupos verdes (group-center) e garantir que fiquem totalmente contidas nos respectivos lobos vermelhos. Mantive o alinhamento diagonal e o stagger vertical natural. O lobo esquerdo (superior) e o direito (inferior) foram ajustados para refletir melhor a forma e o conteúdo dos grupos de texto.

text_layers.original: STOPS ALL MOVEMENT AND TRANSFORMS INTO A SINGLE BOLT OF LIGHTNING THAT UNLEASHES EXPLOSIVE POWER.
text_layers.translated: INTERROMPE TODOS OS MOVIMENTOS E SE TRANSFORMA EM UM ÚNICO RAIO QUE LIBERA PODER EXPLOSIVO.
text_layers.text: STOPS ALL MOVEMENT AND TRANSFORMS INTO A SINGLE BOLT OF LIGHTNING THAT UNLEASHES EXPLOSIVE POWER.

text_layers.original: THIS HUNWON THUNDER, AT THE MOMENT THE INNER ENERGY REACHES A CERTAIN POINT,
text_layers.translated: ESTE TROVÃO HUNWON, NO MOMENTO EM QUE A ENERGIA INTERNA ATINGE UM CERTO PONTO,
text_layers.text: THIS HUNWON THUNDER, AT THE MOMENT THE INNER ENERGY REACHES A CERTAIN POINT,

text_layers.original: BOTH DIVIDE INNER ENERGY INTO YIN AND YANG,
text_layers.translated: AMBOS DIVIDEM A ENERGIA INTERNA EM YIN E YANG,
text_layers.text: BOTH DIVIDE INNER ENERGY INTO YIN AND YANG,

text_layers.original: BUT UNLIKE DRAGON-SUBDUING PALM, WHERE THE TWO FORCES SPIN FIERCELY,
text_layers.translated: MAS, AO CONTRÁRIO DA PALMA SUBJUGADORA DE DRAGÕES, ONDE AS DUAS FORÇAS GIRAM FEROZMENTE,
text_layers.text: BUT UNLIKE DRAGON-SUBDUING PALM, WHERE THE TWO FORCES SPIN FIERCELY,

text_layers.original: THE LIGHTNING OF THE HUNWON MIRROR WAS SIMILAR TO THE SAMADHI TRUE FIRE OF DRAGON-SUBDUING PALM, YET DIFFERENT.
text_layers.translated: O RELÂMPAGO DO ESPELHO HUNWON ERA SEMELHANTE AO VERDADEIRO FOGO SAMADHI DA PALMA SUBJUGADORA DE DRAGÕES, MAS DIFERENTE.
text_layers.text: THE LIGHTNING OF THE HUNWON MIRROR WAS SIMILAR TO THE SAMADHI TRUE FIRE OF DRAGON-SUBDUING PALM, YET DIFFERENT.

textos.original: ONCE THAT FORCE IS RELEASED,
textos.traduzido: UMA VEZ QUE ESSA FORÇA É LIBERADA,

textos.original: STOPS ALL MOVEMENT AND TRANSFORMS INTO A SINGLE BOLT OF LIGHTNING THAT UNLEASHES EXPLOSIVE POWER.
textos.traduzido: INTERROMPE TODOS OS MOVIMENTOS E SE TRANSFORMA EM UM ÚNICO RAIO QUE LIBERA PODER EXPLOSIVO.

textos.original: THIS HUNWON THUNDER, AT THE MOMENT THE INNER ENERGY REACHES A CERTAIN POINT,
textos.traduzido: ESTE TROVÃO HUNWON, NO MOMENTO EM QUE A ENERGIA INTERNA ATINGE UM CERTO PONTO,

textos.original: BOTH DIVIDE INNER ENERGY INTO YIN AND YANG,
textos.traduzido: AMBOS DIVIDEM A ENERGIA INTERNA EM YIN E YANG,

textos.original: BUT UNLIKE DRAGON-SUBDUING PALM, WHERE THE TWO FORCES SPIN FIERCELY,
textos.traduzido: MAS, AO CONTRÁRIO DA PALMA SUBJUGADORA DE DRAGÕES, ONDE AS DUAS FORÇAS GIRAM FEROZMENTE,

textos.original: THE LIGHTNING OF THE HUNWON MIRROR WAS SIMILAR TO THE SAMADHI TRUE FIRE OF DRAGON-SUBDUING PALM, YET DIFFERENT.
textos.traduzido: O RELÂMPAGO DO ESPELHO HUNWON ERA SEMELHANTE AO VERDADEIRO FOGO SAMADHI DA PALMA SUBJUGADORA DE DRAGÕES, MAS DIFERENTE.

text_layers.original: AN INTERESTING CONTRADICTION.
text_layers.translated: UMA CONTRADIÇÃO INTERESSANTE.
text_layers.text: AN INTERESTING CONTRADICTION.

text_layers.original: FOR NOW...
text_layers.translated: POR ENQUANTO...
text_layers.text: FOR NOW...

text_layers.original: SO ONE MUST UNDERSTAND THE QUIETEST PRINCIPLE TO GAIN THE MOST VIOLENT POWER.
text_layers.translated: PORTANTO, É PRECISO COMPREENDER O PRINCÍPIO MAIS SILENCIOSO PARA OBTER O PODER MAIS VIOLENTO.
text_layers.text: SO ONE MUST UNDERSTAND THE QUIETEST PRINCIPLE TO GAIN THE MOST VIOLENT POWER.

text_layers.original: SHALL I CALL IT HUNWON THUNDER ART?
text_layers.translated: DEVO CHAMAR ISSO DE ARTE DO TROVÃO HUNWON?
text_layers.text: SHALL I CALL IT HUNWON THUNDER ART?

text_layers.original: IT CANNOT BE STOPPED BY ANY MEANS.
text_layers.translated: NÃO PODE SER INTERROMPIDO DE FORMA ALGUMA.
text_layers.text: IT CANNOT BE STOPPED BY ANY MEANS.

textos.original: AN INTERESTING CONTRADICTION.
textos.traduzido: UMA CONTRADIÇÃO INTERESSANTE.

textos.original: FOR NOW...
textos.traduzido: POR ENQUANTO...

textos.original: SO ONE MUST UNDERSTAND THE QUIETEST PRINCIPLE TO GAIN THE MOST VIOLENT POWER.
textos.traduzido: PORTANTO, É PRECISO COMPREENDER O PRINCÍPIO MAIS SILENCIOSO PARA OBTER O PODER MAIS VIOLENTO.

textos.original: SHALL I CALL IT HUNWON THUNDER ART?
textos.traduzido: DEVO CHAMAR ISSO DE ARTE DO TROVÃO HUNWON?

textos.original: IT CANNOT BE STOPPED BY ANY MEANS.
textos.traduzido: NÃO PODE SER INTERROMPIDO DE FORMA ALGUMA.

text_layers.translated: Você...!!

text_layers.original: R-RETREAT!!
text_layers.translated: R-RETIRADA!!
text_layers.text: R-RETREAT!!

text_layers.original: GRAAH-!!
text_layers.translated: GRAAH-!!
text_layers.text: GRAAH-!!

text_layers.original: BROTHER JANG IS ALREADY SOMEONE SKILLED IN CREATING, LEARNING, AND REFINING MANY MARTIAL ARTS.
text_layers.translated: O IRMÃO JANG JÁ É ALGUÉM HÁBIL EM CRIAR, APRENDER E REFINAR MUITAS ARTES MARCIAIS.
text_layers.text: BROTHER JANG IS ALREADY SOMEONE SKILLED IN CREATING, LEARNING, AND REFINING MANY MARTIAL ARTS.

text_layers.original: YOU SOLD MASTER'S MARTIAL ART TO A DRIFTER LIKE HIM?!
text_layers.translated: VOCÊ VENDEU A ARTE MARCIAL DE MESTRE PARA UM VAGABUNDO COMO ELE?!
text_layers.text: YOU SOLD MASTER'S MARTIAL ART TO A DRIFTER LIKE HIM?!

textos.traduzido: Você...!!

textos.original: R-RETREAT!!
textos.traduzido: R-RETIRADA!!

textos.original: GRAAH-!!
textos.traduzido: GRAAH-!!

textos.original: BROTHER JANG IS ALREADY SOMEONE SKILLED IN CREATING, LEARNING, AND REFINING MANY MARTIAL ARTS.
textos.traduzido: O IRMÃO JANG JÁ É ALGUÉM HÁBIL EM CRIAR, APRENDER E REFINAR MUITAS ARTES MARCIAIS.

textos.original: YOU SOLD MASTER'S MARTIAL ART TO A DRIFTER LIKE HIM?!
textos.traduzido: VOCÊ VENDEU A ARTE MARCIAL DE MESTRE PARA UM VAGABUNDO COMO ELE?!

text_layers.original: BEFORE LEAVING, WEREN'T YOU FOCUSING MORE ON THE OTHER MARTIAL ARTS MASTER MIXED IN RATHER THAN HUNWON ART?
text_layers.translated: ANTES DE PARTIR, VOCÊ NÃO ESTAVA SE CONCENTRANDO MAIS NOS OUTROS MESTRES DE ARTES MARCIAIS MISTURADOS AO INVÉS DA ARTE HUNWON?
text_layers.text: BEFORE LEAVING, WEREN'T YOU FOCUSING MORE ON THE OTHER MARTIAL ARTS MASTER MIXED IN RATHER THAN HUNWON ART?

text_layers.original: I'M THE ONE WHO PRACTICED IT FOR TWENTY YEARS, YET YOU CLAIM TO KNOW IT BETTER.
text_layers.translated: FUI EU QUE PRATIQUEI ISSO DURANTE VINTE ANOS, MAS VOCÊ AFIRMA CONHECÊ-LO MELHOR.
text_layers.text: I'M THE ONE WHO PRACTICED IT FOR TWENTY YEARS, YET YOU CLAIM TO KNOW IT BETTER.

text_layers.original: AND NOW EVEN THOSE SEEM MIXED WITH SOMETHING ELSE.
text_layers.translated: AND NOW EVEN THOSE SEEM MIXED WITH SOMETHING ELSE.
text_layers.text: AND NOW EVEN THOSE SEEM MIXED WITH SOMETHING ELSE.

text_layers.original: I WATCHED THAT MARTIAL ART FOR TWENTY YEARS-DO YOU THINK I WOULDN'T KNOW?!
text_layers.translated: EU ASSISTI ESSA ARTE MARCIAL POR VINTE ANOS – VOCÊ ACHA QUE EU NÃO SABERIA?!
text_layers.text: I WATCHED THAT MARTIAL ART FOR TWENTY YEARS-DO YOU THINK I WOULDN'T KNOW?!

text_layers.original: THERE WAS NO PRINCIPLE IN THE HUNWON MIRROR ABOUT DRAWING DOWN THUNDER LIKE THAT!!
text_layers.translated: NÃO HAVIA NENHUM PRINCÍPIO NO ESPELHO HUNWON SOBRE ATRAIR TROVÕES DAQUELE JEITO!!
text_layers.text: THERE WAS NO PRINCIPLE IN THE HUNWON MIRROR ABOUT DRAWING DOWN THUNDER LIKE THAT!!

text_layers.original: DON'T BE RIDICULOUS!!
text_layers.translated: NÃO SEJA RIDÍCULO!!
text_layers.text: DON'T BE RIDICULOUS!!

text_layers.original: THAT LIGHTNING IS THE HUNWON MIRROR?!
text_layers.translated: ESSE RAIO É O ESPELHO HUNWON?!
text_layers.text: THAT LIGHTNING IS THE HUNWON MIRROR?!

text_layers.original: ...HE'S RIGHT.
text_layers.translated: ...ELE ESTÁ CERTO.
text_layers.text: ...HE'S RIGHT.

text_layers.original: HE READ THE HUNWON MIRROR AND ADAPTED ITS ESSENCE INTO THE FORM THAT SUITED HIM BEST.
text_layers.translated: ELE LEU O ESPELHO HUNWON E ADAPTOU SUA ESSÊNCIA NA FORMA QUE MELHOR LHE CONVINHA.
text_layers.text: HE READ THE HUNWON MIRROR AND ADAPTED ITS ESSENCE INTO THE FORM THAT SUITED HIM BEST.

text_layers.original: ABOVE ALL, MASTER PERMITTED IT, SO SAYING IT WAS SOLD IS INCORRECT.
text_layers.translated: ACIMA DE TUDO, O MESTRE PERMITIU, ENTÃO DIZER QUE FOI VENDIDO É INCORRETO.
text_layers.text: ABOVE ALL, MASTER PERMITTED IT, SO SAYING IT WAS SOLD IS INCORRECT.

textos.original: BEFORE LEAVING, WEREN'T YOU FOCUSING MORE ON THE OTHER MARTIAL ARTS MASTER MIXED IN RATHER THAN HUNWON ART?
textos.traduzido: ANTES DE PARTIR, VOCÊ NÃO ESTAVA SE CONCENTRANDO MAIS NOS OUTROS MESTRES DE ARTES MARCIAIS MISTURADOS AO INVÉS DA ARTE HUNWON?

textos.original: I'M THE ONE WHO PRACTICED IT FOR TWENTY YEARS, YET YOU CLAIM TO KNOW IT BETTER.
textos.traduzido: FUI EU QUE PRATIQUEI ISSO DURANTE VINTE ANOS, MAS VOCÊ AFIRMA CONHECÊ-LO MELHOR.

textos.original: AND NOW EVEN THOSE SEEM MIXED WITH SOMETHING ELSE.
textos.traduzido: AND NOW EVEN THOSE SEEM MIXED WITH SOMETHING ELSE.

textos.original: I WATCHED THAT MARTIAL ART FOR TWENTY YEARS-DO YOU THINK I WOULDN'T KNOW?!
textos.traduzido: EU ASSISTI ESSA ARTE MARCIAL POR VINTE ANOS – VOCÊ ACHA QUE EU NÃO SABERIA?!

textos.original: THERE WAS NO PRINCIPLE IN THE HUNWON MIRROR ABOUT DRAWING DOWN THUNDER LIKE THAT!!
textos.traduzido: NÃO HAVIA NENHUM PRINCÍPIO NO ESPELHO HUNWON SOBRE ATRAIR TROVÕES DAQUELE JEITO!!

textos.original: DON'T BE RIDICULOUS!!
textos.traduzido: NÃO SEJA RIDÍCULO!!

textos.original: THAT LIGHTNING IS THE HUNWON MIRROR?!
textos.traduzido: ESSE RAIO É O ESPELHO HUNWON?!

textos.original: ...HE'S RIGHT.
textos.traduzido: ...ELE ESTÁ CERTO.

textos.original: HE READ THE HUNWON MIRROR AND ADAPTED ITS ESSENCE INTO THE FORM THAT SUITED HIM BEST.
textos.traduzido: ELE LEU O ESPELHO HUNWON E ADAPTOU SUA ESSÊNCIA NA FORMA QUE MELHOR LHE CONVINHA.

textos.original: ABOVE ALL, MASTER PERMITTED IT, SO SAYING IT WAS SOLD IS INCORRECT.
textos.traduzido: ACIMA DE TUDO, O MESTRE PERMITIU, ENTÃO DIZER QUE FOI VENDIDO É INCORRETO.

text_layers.original: I NATURALLY BELIEVED THE THUNDER-LIKE MARTIAL ART WAS IMPERIAL ARMY MARTIAL ARTS.
text_layers.translated: NATURALMENTE, EU ACREDITAVA QUE A ARTE MARCIAL SEMELHANTE AO TROVÃO ERA UMA ARTE MARCIAL DO EXÉRCITO IMPERIAL.
text_layers.text: I NATURALLY BELIEVED THE THUNDER-LIKE MARTIAL ART WAS IMPERIAL ARMY MARTIAL ARTS.

text_layers.original: AND AFTER I LATER LEARNED THE OLD MAN'S TRUE IDENTITY...
text_layers.translated: E DEPOIS QUE DESCOBRI A VERDADEIRA IDENTIDADE DO VELHO...
text_layers.text: AND AFTER I LATER LEARNED THE OLD MAN'S TRUE IDENTITY...

text_layers.original: OF COURSE. THAT OUTDATED THIRD-RATE MARTIAL ART I KNEW COULDN'T POSSIBLY HAVE SUCH POWER.
text_layers.translated: CLARO. AQUELA ARTE MARCIAL DE TERCEIRA CATEGORIA ULTRAPASSADA QUE EU CONHECIA NÃO PODERIA TER TAL PODER.
text_layers.text: OF COURSE. THAT OUTDATED THIRD-RATE MARTIAL ART I KNEW COULDN'T POSSIBLY HAVE SUCH POWER.

text_layers.original: I THOUGHT THE REASON I COULDN'T ACHIEVE IT WAS BECAUSE IT WAS AN INCOMPLETE MARTIAL ART...
text_layers.translated: EU PENSEI QUE A RAZÃO PELA QUAL NÃO CONSEGUI ISSO ERA PORQUE ERA UMA ARTE MARCIAL INCOMPLETA...
text_layers.text: I THOUGHT THE REASON I COULDN'T ACHIEVE IT WAS BECAUSE IT WAS AN INCOMPLETE MARTIAL ART...

text_layers.original: BUT...
text_layers.translated: MAS...
text_layers.text: BUT...

text_layers.original: AND FILLED THE GAPS WITH NEW MARTIAL ARTS TAUGHT BY THE ALLIANCE LEADER.
text_layers.translated: E PREENCHEU AS LACUNAS COM NOVAS ARTES MARCIAIS ENSINADAS PELO LÍDER DA ALIANÇA.
text_layers.text: AND FILLED THE GAPS WITH NEW MARTIAL ARTS TAUGHT BY THE ALLIANCE LEADER.

text_layers.original: EVEN THEN, AFTER THAT DAY I COMPLETELY DISCARDED THE HUNWON MIRROR'S TEACHINGS,
text_layers.translated: MESMO ASSIM, DEPOIS DAQUELE DIA, DESCARTEI COMPLETAMENTE OS ENSINAMENTOS DO ESPELHO HUNWON,
text_layers.text: EVEN THEN, AFTER THAT DAY I COMPLETELY DISCARDED THE HUNWON MIRROR'S TEACHINGS,

text_layers.original: AND FOCUSED ONLY ON THE FASTER AND STRONGER PARTS.
text_layers.translated: E FOCADO APENAS NAS PARTES MAIS RÁPIDAS E FORTES.
text_layers.text: AND FOCUSED ONLY ON THE FASTER AND STRONGER PARTS.

text_layers.original: FROM THE MARTIAL ARTS I LEARNED FROM THE OLD MAN, I REMOVED ALL THE VAGUE AND UNNECESSARY PARTS,
text_layers.translated: DAS ARTES MARCIAIS QUE APRENDI COM O VELHO, RETIREI TODAS AS PARTES VAGAS E DESNECESSÁRIAS,
text_layers.text: FROM THE MARTIAL ARTS I LEARNED FROM THE OLD MAN, I REMOVED ALL THE VAGUE AND UNNECESSARY PARTS,

textos.original: I NATURALLY BELIEVED THE THUNDER-LIKE MARTIAL ART WAS IMPERIAL ARMY MARTIAL ARTS.
textos.traduzido: NATURALMENTE, EU ACREDITAVA QUE A ARTE MARCIAL SEMELHANTE AO TROVÃO ERA UMA ARTE MARCIAL DO EXÉRCITO IMPERIAL.

textos.original: AND AFTER I LATER LEARNED THE OLD MAN'S TRUE IDENTITY...
textos.traduzido: E DEPOIS QUE DESCOBRI A VERDADEIRA IDENTIDADE DO VELHO...

textos.original: OF COURSE. THAT OUTDATED THIRD-RATE MARTIAL ART I KNEW COULDN'T POSSIBLY HAVE SUCH POWER.
textos.traduzido: CLARO. AQUELA ARTE MARCIAL DE TERCEIRA CATEGORIA ULTRAPASSADA QUE EU CONHECIA NÃO PODERIA TER TAL PODER.

textos.original: I THOUGHT THE REASON I COULDN'T ACHIEVE IT WAS BECAUSE IT WAS AN INCOMPLETE MARTIAL ART...
textos.traduzido: EU PENSEI QUE A RAZÃO PELA QUAL NÃO CONSEGUI ISSO ERA PORQUE ERA UMA ARTE MARCIAL INCOMPLETA...

textos.original: BUT...
textos.traduzido: MAS...

textos.original: AND FILLED THE GAPS WITH NEW MARTIAL ARTS TAUGHT BY THE ALLIANCE LEADER.
textos.traduzido: E PREENCHEU AS LACUNAS COM NOVAS ARTES MARCIAIS ENSINADAS PELO LÍDER DA ALIANÇA.

textos.original: EVEN THEN, AFTER THAT DAY I COMPLETELY DISCARDED THE HUNWON MIRROR'S TEACHINGS,
textos.traduzido: MESMO ASSIM, DEPOIS DAQUELE DIA, DESCARTEI COMPLETAMENTE OS ENSINAMENTOS DO ESPELHO HUNWON,

textos.original: AND FOCUSED ONLY ON THE FASTER AND STRONGER PARTS.
textos.traduzido: E FOCADO APENAS NAS PARTES MAIS RÁPIDAS E FORTES.

textos.original: FROM THE MARTIAL ARTS I LEARNED FROM THE OLD MAN, I REMOVED ALL THE VAGUE AND UNNECESSARY PARTS,
textos.traduzido: DAS ARTES MARCIAIS QUE APRENDI COM O VELHO, RETIREI TODAS AS PARTES VAGAS E DESNECESSÁRIAS,

text_layers.original: AND THIS AS WELL.
text_layers.translated: E ISSO TAMBÉM.
text_layers.text: AND THIS AS WELL.

text_layers.original: ...THAT WAS YOUR MASTER'S FINAL MESSAGE.
text_layers.translated: ...ESSA FOI A MENSAGEM FINAL DO SEU MESTRE.
text_layers.text: ...THAT WAS YOUR MASTER'S FINAL MESSAGE.

text_layers.original: IF WHAT HE SAYS IS TRUE...
text_layers.translated: SE O QUE ELE DIZ É VERDADE...
text_layers.text: IF WHAT HE SAYS IS TRUE...

text_layers.original: THEN... WHAT HAVE I BEEN DOING ALL THIS TIME...
text_layers.translated: ENTÃO... O QUE EU TENHO FEITO TODO ESSE TEMPO...
text_layers.text: THEN... WHAT HAVE I BEEN DOING ALL THIS TIME...

textos.original: AND THIS AS WELL.
textos.traduzido: E ISSO TAMBÉM.

textos.original: ...THAT WAS YOUR MASTER'S FINAL MESSAGE.
textos.traduzido: ...ESSA FOI A MENSAGEM FINAL DO SEU MESTRE.

textos.original: IF WHAT HE SAYS IS TRUE...
textos.traduzido: SE O QUE ELE DIZ É VERDADE...

textos.original: THEN... WHAT HAVE I BEEN DOING ALL THIS TIME...
textos.traduzido: ENTÃO... O QUE EU TENHO FEITO TODO ESSE TEMPO...

text_layers.original: WHAT'S WITH THAT ARROGANT TONE?
text_layers.translated: O QUE HÁ COM ESSE TOM ARROGANTE?
text_layers.text: WHAT'S WITH THAT ARROGANT TONE?

text_layers.original: ARE YOU ACCUSING ME OF BETRAYING OUR MASTER AND DESTROYING OUR LINEAGE?
text_layers.translated: VOCÊ ESTÁ ME ACUSANDO DE TRAIR NOSSO MESTRE E DESTRUIR NOSSA LINHAGEM?
text_layers.text: ARE YOU ACCUSING ME OF BETRAYING OUR MASTER AND DESTROYING OUR LINEAGE?

text_layers.original: WE MUST SETTLE THINGS BETWEEN OURSELVES.
text_layers.translated: DEVEMOS RESOLVER AS COISAS ENTRE NÓS.
text_layers.text: WE MUST SETTLE THINGS BETWEEN OURSELVES.

text_layers.original: PREPARE YOURSELF, SENIOR BROTHER.
text_layers.translated: PREPARE-SE, IRMÃO MAIS VELHO.
text_layers.text: PREPARE YOURSELF, SENIOR BROTHER.

text_layers.original: MASTER...
text_layers.translated: MESTRE...
text_layers.text: MASTER...

textos.original: WHAT'S WITH THAT ARROGANT TONE?
textos.traduzido: O QUE HÁ COM ESSE TOM ARROGANTE?

textos.original: ARE YOU ACCUSING ME OF BETRAYING OUR MASTER AND DESTROYING OUR LINEAGE?
textos.traduzido: VOCÊ ESTÁ ME ACUSANDO DE TRAIR NOSSO MESTRE E DESTRUIR NOSSA LINHAGEM?

textos.original: WE MUST SETTLE THINGS BETWEEN OURSELVES.
textos.traduzido: DEVEMOS RESOLVER AS COISAS ENTRE NÓS.

textos.original: PREPARE YOURSELF, SENIOR BROTHER.
textos.traduzido: PREPARE-SE, IRMÃO MAIS VELHO.

textos.original: MASTER...
textos.traduzido: MESTRE...

text_layers.original: KRAHAHAHA...!!
text_layers.translated: HAHAHAHA...!!
text_layers.text: KRAHAHAHA...!!

text_layers.original: YOU'RE RIGHT. REVENGE ALWAYS COMES AROUND.
text_layers.translated: VOCÊ ESTÁ CERTO. A VINGANÇA SEMPRE APARECE.
text_layers.text: YOU'RE RIGHT. REVENGE ALWAYS COMES AROUND.

text_layers.original: JUST REVENGE BORN OF RESENTMENT.
text_layers.translated: APENAS VINGANÇA NASCIDA DO RESSENTIMENTO.
text_layers.text: JUST REVENGE BORN OF RESENTMENT.

text_layers.original: HEH HEH...
text_layers.translated: HEH HEH...
text_layers.text: HEH HEH...

text_layers.original: NO DIFFERENT FROM WHAT YOU WANTED,
text_layers.translated: NÃO É DIFERENTE DO QUE VOCÊ QUERIA,
text_layers.text: NO DIFFERENT FROM WHAT YOU WANTED,

text_layers.original: PLAIN REVENGE.
text_layers.translated: VINGANÇA PURA.
text_layers.text: PLAIN REVENGE.

text_layers.original: THIS IS SIMPLY...
text_layers.translated: ISTO É SIMPLESMENTE...
text_layers.text: THIS IS SIMPLY...

text_layers.original: MASTER EXPELLED YOU FIRST, SO I CAN'T ACCUSE YOU OF SUCH A GRAND CRIME.
text_layers.translated: O MESTRE EXPULSOU VOCÊ PRIMEIRO, ENTÃO NÃO POSSO ACUSÁ-LO DE UM CRIME TÃO GRANDE.
text_layers.text: MASTER EXPELLED YOU FIRST, SO I CAN'T ACCUSE YOU OF SUCH A GRAND CRIME.

textos.original: KRAHAHAHA...!!
textos.traduzido: HAHAHAHA...!!

textos.original: YOU'RE RIGHT. REVENGE ALWAYS COMES AROUND.
textos.traduzido: VOCÊ ESTÁ CERTO. A VINGANÇA SEMPRE APARECE.

textos.original: JUST REVENGE BORN OF RESENTMENT.
textos.traduzido: APENAS VINGANÇA NASCIDA DO RESSENTIMENTO.

textos.original: HEH HEH...
textos.traduzido: HEH HEH...

textos.original: NO DIFFERENT FROM WHAT YOU WANTED,
textos.traduzido: NÃO É DIFERENTE DO QUE VOCÊ QUERIA,

textos.original: PLAIN REVENGE.
textos.traduzido: VINGANÇA PURA.

textos.original: THIS IS SIMPLY...
textos.traduzido: ISTO É SIMPLESMENTE...

textos.original: MASTER EXPELLED YOU FIRST, SO I CAN'T ACCUSE YOU OF SUCH A GRAND CRIME.
textos.traduzido: O MESTRE EXPULSOU VOCÊ PRIMEIRO, ENTÃO NÃO POSSO ACUSÁ-LO DE UM CRIME TÃO GRANDE.

text_layers.original: YANG-GAM WILL BE PLEASED IN HELL.
text_layers.translated: YANG-GAM FICARÁ SATISFEITO NO INFERNO.
text_layers.text: YANG-GAM WILL BE PLEASED IN HELL.

text_layers.original: THAT SOFT DISCIPLE HAS FINALLY GAINED SOME SPIRIT.
text_layers.translated: ESSE DISCÍPULO SUAVE FINALMENTE GANHOU ALGUM ESPÍRITO.
text_layers.text: THAT SOFT DISCIPLE HAS FINALLY GAINED SOME SPIRIT.

text_layers.original: COME THEN, LET'S SEE THIS REVENGE.
text_layers.translated: VENHA ENTÃO, VAMOS VER ESSA VINGANÇA.
text_layers.text: COME THEN, LET'S SEE THIS REVENGE.

textos.original: YANG-GAM WILL BE PLEASED IN HELL.
textos.traduzido: YANG-GAM FICARÁ SATISFEITO NO INFERNO.

textos.original: THAT SOFT DISCIPLE HAS FINALLY GAINED SOME SPIRIT.
textos.traduzido: ESSE DISCÍPULO SUAVE FINALMENTE GANHOU ALGUM ESPÍRITO.

textos.original: COME THEN, LET'S SEE THIS REVENGE.
textos.traduzido: VENHA ENTÃO, VAMOS VER ESSA VINGANÇA.

text_layers.original: EVEN THE MARTIAL ART OF THE FOUNDER WHO UNIFIED THE CENTRAL PLAINS LONG AGO CAME FROM THOSE SAGES.
text_layers.translated: ATÉ MESMO A ARTE MARCIAL DO FUNDADOR QUE UNIFICOU AS PLANÍCIES CENTRAIS HÁ MUITO TEMPO VEIO DESSES SÁBIOS.
text_layers.text: EVEN THE MARTIAL ART OF THE FOUNDER WHO UNIFIED THE CENTRAL PLAINS LONG AGO CAME FROM THOSE SAGES.

text_layers.original: HEH HEH...
text_layers.translated: HEH HEH...
text_layers.text: HEH HEH...

text_layers.original: SO THEY HID IT LITTLE BY LITTLE BETWEEN THE VERSES.
text_layers.translated: ENTÃO ELES ESCONDERAM AOS POUCOS ENTRE OS VERSOS.
text_layers.text: SO THEY HID IT LITTLE BY LITTLE BETWEEN THE VERSES.

text_layers.original: THE ANCIENT SAGES SIMPLY SAW IT NOT AS A KILLING TOOL BUT AS A WAY OF LIFE,
text_layers.translated: OS ANTIGOS SÁBIOS SIMPLESMENTE VIAM-NO NÃO COMO UMA FERRAMENTA MORTAL, MAS COMO UM MODO DE VIDA,
text_layers.text: THE ANCIENT SAGES SIMPLY SAW IT NOT AS A KILLING TOOL BUT AS A WAY OF LIFE,

text_layers.original: THERE CAN BE MANY GREAT MARTIAL ARTS BESIDES THE EMPEROR'S.
text_layers.translated: PODE HAVER MUITAS ARTES MARCIAIS EXCELENTES ALÉM DA DO IMPERADOR.
text_layers.text: THERE CAN BE MANY GREAT MARTIAL ARTS BESIDES THE EMPEROR'S.

text_layers.original: REALLY...
text_layers.translated: REALMENTE...
text_layers.text: REALLY...

text_layers.original: NOT IMPERIAL ARMY MARTIAL ARTS?
text_layers.translated: NÃO SÃO ARTES MARCIAIS DO EXÉRCITO IMPERIAL?
text_layers.text: NOT IMPERIAL ARMY MARTIAL ARTS?

text_layers.original: WAS THAT THUNDER TRULY THE ULTIMATE SECRET OF THE HUNWON MIRROR?
text_layers.translated: ESSE TROVÃO ERA REALMENTE O SEGREDO FINAL DO ESPELHO HUNWON?
text_layers.text: WAS THAT THUNDER TRULY THE ULTIMATE SECRET OF THE HUNWON MIRROR?

textos.original: EVEN THE MARTIAL ART OF THE FOUNDER WHO UNIFIED THE CENTRAL PLAINS LONG AGO CAME FROM THOSE SAGES.
textos.traduzido: ATÉ MESMO A ARTE MARCIAL DO FUNDADOR QUE UNIFICOU AS PLANÍCIES CENTRAIS HÁ MUITO TEMPO VEIO DESSES SÁBIOS.

textos.original: HEH HEH...
textos.traduzido: HEH HEH...

textos.original: SO THEY HID IT LITTLE BY LITTLE BETWEEN THE VERSES.
textos.traduzido: ENTÃO ELES ESCONDERAM AOS POUCOS ENTRE OS VERSOS.

textos.original: THE ANCIENT SAGES SIMPLY SAW IT NOT AS A KILLING TOOL BUT AS A WAY OF LIFE,
textos.traduzido: OS ANTIGOS SÁBIOS SIMPLESMENTE VIAM-NO NÃO COMO UMA FERRAMENTA MORTAL, MAS COMO UM MODO DE VIDA,

textos.original: THERE CAN BE MANY GREAT MARTIAL ARTS BESIDES THE EMPEROR'S.
textos.traduzido: PODE HAVER MUITAS ARTES MARCIAIS EXCELENTES ALÉM DA DO IMPERADOR.

textos.original: REALLY...
textos.traduzido: REALMENTE...

textos.original: NOT IMPERIAL ARMY MARTIAL ARTS?
textos.traduzido: NÃO SÃO ARTES MARCIAIS DO EXÉRCITO IMPERIAL?

textos.original: WAS THAT THUNDER TRULY THE ULTIMATE SECRET OF THE HUNWON MIRROR?
textos.traduzido: ESSE TROVÃO ERA REALMENTE O SEGREDO FINAL DO ESPELHO HUNWON?

text_layers.original: DAD-!!
text_layers.translated: PAI-!!
text_layers.text: DAD-!!

text_layers.original: IS TOO SLOW...
text_layers.translated: É MUITO LENTO...
text_layers.text: IS TOO SLOW...

text_layers.original: STILL... THE HUNWON MIRROR...
text_layers.translated: AINDA ASSIM... O ESPELHO HUNWON...
text_layers.text: STILL... THE HUNWON MIRROR...

textos.original: DAD-!!
textos.traduzido: PAI-!!

textos.original: IS TOO SLOW...
textos.traduzido: É MUITO LENTO...

textos.original: STILL... THE HUNWON MIRROR...
textos.traduzido: AINDA ASSIM... O ESPELHO HUNWON...

text_layers.original: PHEW...
text_layers.translated: UFA...
text_layers.text: PHEW...

text_layers.original: I'M SORRY... BECAUSE OF ME...
text_layers.translated: ME DESCULPE... POR MINHA CAUSA...
text_layers.text: I'M SORRY... BECAUSE OF ME...

text_layers.original: DON'T SAY THAT. ARE YOUR INJURIES ALRIGHT?
text_layers.translated: NÃO DIGA ISSO. SEUS FERIMENTOS ESTÃO BEM?
text_layers.text: DON'T SAY THAT. ARE YOUR INJURIES ALRIGHT?

textos.original: PHEW...
textos.traduzido: UFA...

textos.original: I'M SORRY... BECAUSE OF ME...
textos.traduzido: ME DESCULPE... POR MINHA CAUSA...

textos.original: DON'T SAY THAT. ARE YOUR INJURIES ALRIGHT?
textos.traduzido: NÃO DIGA ISSO. SEUS FERIMENTOS ESTÃO BEM?

text_layers.original: ...IT'S ABOUT TIME TO FINISH THIS.
text_layers.translated: ...JÁ ESTÁ NA HORA DE TERMINAR ISSO.
text_layers.text: ...IT'S ABOUT TIME TO FINISH THIS.

textos.original: ...IT'S ABOUT TIME TO FINISH THIS.
textos.traduzido: ...JÁ ESTÁ NA HORA DE TERMINAR ISSO.
